title: 2 Stainless Steel Dog Bowls,Dog Feeding Bowls,Dog Food Plate Bowls With Non-slip Rubber Bases,Small Pet Feeder Bowls And Water Bowls (S- 350 ml/11.8oz)
features: 【Size: Diameter】 Bowl bottom: 18cm (7in). Bowl mouth: 13cm (5.3in). Bowl height: 5cm (1.9in).Can hold 350 ml/11.8oz of food.Suitable for small animals such as cats and puppies.

【Scratch-resistant base】The pet bowl has a scratch-resistant rubber base to prevent the floor from being scratched and at the same time prevent pets from overturning the bowl,Can keep silent while pets are eating.
【Multipurpose】 Perfect feeding bowl for holding dry kibble or wet food, treats and water, and it is suitable for your pets to use。
【Easy to clean】Just clean up the pet food bowl with water, convenient to clean and use.Can be put into the dishwasher, easy to clean.

【Material】 The dog bowl is made of high-quality stainless steel, which is durable and easy to clean. Compared with plastic, it is more anti-falling. The dog bowl kit has passed strict quality inspections. If you are not satisfied with 100%, you can replace or refund-if you have any questions, please contact us first, we will solve your problem as soon as possible
